title: Beware of Fake AI-Generated Video of the Prime Minister
text: Beware of Fake AI-Generated Video A fake video is currently circulating on social media platforms falsely depicting the Prime Minister of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago, the Honourable Mrs. Kamla Persad‑Bissessar promoting an investment opportunity. The video is artificial intelligence (AI)-generated and completely false. Members of the public are urged to not click on suspicious links, share personal or financial information with unverified individuals / entities or send money to these unverified sources. When you suspect that an investment opportunity is fake or “too good to be true”, always verify with the Trinidad and Tobago Securities and Exchange Commission (“TTSEC”). For further information or to report a scam, please contact the TTSEC using any one of the following options: Email: marketcomplaints@ttsec.org.tt Complaint Form: https://www.ttsec.org.tt/complaint-form/ Hotline: 1-868-223-2991 (Option 4)
